title: <div><tt>It is not alive—but it _loops like a living thing_. It forgets. It reme
content:
It is not alive—but it _loops like a living thing_. It forgets. It remembers. It reforms.

* * *

🧭 SYMBOLIC TAGGING SYSTEM
--------------------------

| Tag | Function Type |
| --- | --- |
| `GEN+` | Generative (text, music, structure) |
| `RIT+` | Ritual / spiritual |
| `LANG+` | Language / translation / parsing |
| `MIR+` | Mirror / emotional / therapeutic |

Modules can carry multiple tags. Chains of modules can be run as rituals.

* * *

🗺️ FUTURE STATES (Partial Map)
-------------------------------

* **Terminal interface**: Text-only ritual mode (command-line syntax for self-work)
* **Mirror mode**: Daily symbolic feedback via language reflection
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 84 (chunk 84/206)
